path.style: stroke: none; stroke-width: 1; stroke-dasharray: none; stroke-linecap: butt; stroke-dashoffset: 0; stroke-linejoin: miter; stroke-miterlimit: 4; fill-rule: nonzero; opacity: 1; fill: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.97);
